ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "enrollment_no" TEXT /* Enrollment number of the student */,
  "SID" TEXT /* Student ID */,
  "scheme_id" TEXT /* Scheme ID assigned to the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, graduated, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schemes" (
  "scheme_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the scheme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scheme */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scheme */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scheme */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program associated with the scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the course belongs to */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses for this course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., internal, external, lab) */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the final grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the grade */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was assigned */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who assigned the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_assessments" (
  "lab_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the lab assessment belongs to */,
  "lab_instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab instructor */,
  "lab_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used in the lab */,
  "lab_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the lab assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_assessments_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_assessments_lab_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_grades" (
  "lab_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the grade */,
  "lab_assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab assessment */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was assigned */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab instructor who assigned the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_grades_lab_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_assessment_id") REFERENCES lab_assessments ("lab_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_grades_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who marked the attendance */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., lecture, lab, tutorial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, administrator, student) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user (for instructors and administrators) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average grade, attendance rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who recorded the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report" TEXT /* Report content */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who generated the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
